global.title: US-Israel-Iran War Escalates: Operation Epic Fury Day 11
global.what_happened: Conflict entered second week with 900+ initial strikes, 1,300+ deaths, Strait of Hormuz closure, oil >$100/barbell. Trump predicts 'quick end' but no ceasefire signals.
global.why_matters: Major energy supply shock impacts global markets, inflation, and risk pricing for commercial insurance. Uruguay calling for de-escalation.

global.title: Iran Appoints Hardline Leader Mojtaba Khamenei
global.what_happened: Late Supreme Leader's son appointed amid war. Trump threatens appointee 'will not last long.' Interim Council under Ali Larijani formed.
global.why_matters: Leadership instability extends conflict timeline, increases regional proxy activity (Hezbollah already joined).

global.title: Global Oil Prices Surge Above $100/Barrel
global.what_happened: Strait of Hormuz closure and Qatar LNG export halt caused energy price spike. European allies skeptical but may increase support.
global.why_matters: Energy cost shock impacts transport, manufacturing, and insurance risk models. Inflationary pressure on LATAM import-dependent economies.

global.title: Qatar Suspends LNG Exports
global.what_happened: Major LNG supplier halted exports due to regional conflict. Saudi Aramco refineries also struck.
global.why_matters: Winter energy security concerns for Europe, price spikes for Asia. Uruguay energy imports potentially impacted.

global.title: Democrats Scrutinize Prediction Markets on Strike Timing
global.what_happened: Calls for oversight of betting platforms following suspected foreknowledge of US-Israeli strikes.
global.why_matters: Regulatory scrutiny of prediction markets increasing. Potential spillover to crypto/fintech oversight.

uruguay.title: Women's Day Protests Across Uruguay
uruguay.what_happened: March 8 rallies focused on femicide opposition, public funding for gender violence laws, economic austerity impacts on women.
uruguay.why_matters_uruguay: Social policy pressure growing; Orsi administration may face demands for expanded gender-violence program funding.

uruguay.title: President Orsi's First-Year Address
uruguay.what_happened: Defended economic stability, falling unemployment/crime, slight wage increases. Announced new justice ministry + security/health/transport projects.
uruguay.why_matters_uruguay: Political stability signal for investors. New ministry creates opportunity for insurtech gov contracts.

uruguay.title: Foreign Income Tax Changes Effective Jan 2026
uruguay.what_happened: Ley 20.446: foreign-sourced income now taxed at 12% for residents without tax holiday. Real estate investment threshold raised to ~USD 2M.
uruguay.why_matters_uruguay: Impacts expat/foreign resident insurance needs. Changes residency dynamics for international clients.

uruguay.title: Chevron Approved for Offshore Seismic Survey
uruguay.what_happened: 3D seismic survey authorized through April with environmental safeguards in Uruguayan waters.
uruguay.why_matters_uruguay: Potential oil/gas discovery could transform energy sector, insurable risk landscape for offshore operations.

uruguay.title: Orsi Attending Chile Presidential Inauguration
uruguay.what_happened: President Orsi joining Milei (Argentina) and other regional leaders at Chilean ceremony March 11.
uruguay.why_matters_uruguay: Regional diplomacy continues despite tensions. Potential for LATAM economic cooperation discussions.

watch: March 11: Chile presidential inauguration - regional leaders summit potential
March 10: Montevideo demonstration alert (US Embassy) - avoid downtown congestion
Ongoing: Middle East conflict trajectory - watch for Hormuz reopening signals
